notes: Ticket Configuration Pages: 3 pages (SLA Policies, Types, Automations) with full CRUD, backend tRPC router, Zod validators. 96 total tests (57 frontend + 16 backend + 23 validators). All 4 validations pass: TypeScript, Tests, Lint, Build.

validation_results.name: TypeScript
validation_results.command: pnpm --filter @intelliflow/web run typecheck && pnpm --filter @intelliflow/api run typecheck && pnpm --filter @intelliflow/validators run typecheck

validation_results.name: Tests
validation_results.command: pnpm --filter @intelliflow/web exec vitest run src/components/tickets/__tests__/SLAPolicyManager src/components/tickets/__tests__/TicketTypeManager src/components/tickets/__tests__/AutomationRuleBuilder && pnpm --filter @intelliflow/api exec vitest run src/modules/ticket/__tests__/ticket-config && pnpm --filter @intelliflow/validators exec vitest run src/__tests__/ticket-config-validators
